data.content: Shipment complete. Reviewed commit b85d2479 was fast-forwarded to origin/main. Main CI run 29308557728 and Coverage Badge run 29308557731 both completed successfully. Patch release v0.14.17 was cut by the project release script at commit 20e0e53d and published at https://github.com/acartine/foolery/releases/tag/v0.14.17. Release Runtime Artifact run 29308716746 passed for darwin-arm64, linux-x64, and linux-arm64. All three tarballs and their three .sha256 files are uploaded. Sneka attribution notes for implementation and release commits are pushed.
